subtasks.description: Query IAM system to retrieve user's current role, assigned permissions, and group memberships
Retrieve pending manager approval request from workflow system for the user's access provisioning request
Update IAM permissions based on approved access request and current role state
Send confirmation email to user and manager documenting the IAM permission changes and completion of access provisioning

plan.cost_rationale: This workflow requires orchestration across 4 distinct operational steps, each involving external systems (IAM, workflow, email). Check current IAM role is a simple query (small tier, sql_gen). Fetching manager approval and updating IAM permissions both require multi-tool invocation from the enterprise registry (multitool_plan, mid tier) since they involve system calls beyond single data queries. Email confirmation is also a tool call (multitool_plan, small tier). Dependencies are sequential: role check and approval fetch can run in parallel, then both feed into permission update, which then triggers email. This is the minimal decomposition—no cross_recon needed (single-system state reads), no policy_action needed (the manager approval IS the governance decision), and each operational step maps to one subtask.

output.sql: SELECT u.user_id, alf.permission, alf.resource, alf.action, alf.result FROM access_log_facts alf JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM access_log_facts ORDER BY user_id LIMIT 1) u ON alf.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY alf.access_time DESC

arguments.subject: Access Provisioning Confirmation - Request $2.request_id
arguments.body:
Your access provisioning has been completed successfully.

Request ID: $2.request_id
Role Granted: $2.requested_role
Resource: $2.requested_resource
Approved By: $2.approved_by
Completion Date: $2.completion_timestamp

Your access is now active and ready for use.

arguments.subject: Team Member Access Provisioning Completed - Request $2.request_id
arguments.body:
Access provisioning for your team member has been successfully completed.

Employee: $3.name
Request ID: $2.request_id
Role Granted: $2.requested_role
Resource: $2.requested_resource
Provisioning Status: $2.provisioning_status
Completion Date: $2.completion_timestamp

Please retain this confirmation for your records.
